## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `orion ...`
2. Connect to device `...`
3. See error: `...`

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Diagnostics (Output of `orion doctor`)
Please paste the command output of `orion doctor` below:
```text
<Paste here>
```

## System Information
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS Sequoia, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Orion CLI Version: [e.g. v0.1.0-beta]
- Go Version (if building from source): [e.g. 1.22]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. firewall settings, VPN connections).
